description: As a condition of a drug approval, a company has made a post-marketing commitment to a health authority to conduct a new study. A regulatory manager must track this commitment.

nodes.task_description: Log the post-marketing commitment into the regulatory tracking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new record for the commitment, including its description and due date.

nodes.task_description: Assign ownership of the commitment to the relevant internal department (e.g., Clinical Operations).

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the commitment to the head of Clinical Operations.

nodes.task_description: Periodically check on the status of the commitment to ensure it is on track to be met by the deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends automated reminders and requests status updates from the owner.

nodes.task_description: Submit the final study report to the health authority to fulfill the commitment.

expected_outcome.value: Once the study is complete, the agent submits the report and closes the commitment record.
